content: swift package generate-xcodeproj is deprecated (Swift Forums RFC) and removed since Swift 5.9.x ('Unknown subcommand'). Since Xcode 11, Xcode opens Package.swift directly to edit/build/test. Current path to a Mac App Store app: keep Package.swift as source of truth (library targets), and add a thin Xcode app target that references the package locally; App Store bundle config (Info.plist, entitlements, sandbox, signing, appex) lives in the Xcode project, NOT in SPM.
